title: IVL_UVM: internal error around class method calls
body:
Hi,
  I have managed to reproduce one of the crashes from Icarus (12.0 dev release) that has been bothering me for a week or so using a single file. It is not trivial code, so uploaded to:

https://github.com/svenka3/code_to_ivl_team/blob/main/ivl_uvm_comp_crash/ivl_uvm_single.sv

(Than pasting code below).

I get a crash as below:

```log
../ivl_uvm_single_file.sv:999: warning: User function 'm_check_verbosity' is being called as a task.
../ivl_uvm_single_file.sv:1091: warning: User function 'uvm_count_info' is being called as a task.
../ivl_uvm_single_file.sv:1210: internal error: Can't find task uvm_count_info in class uvm_component
../ivl_uvm_single_file.sv:1210: warning: User function 'uvm_count_info' is being called as a task.
../ivl_uvm_single_file.sv:1214: internal error: Can't find task uvm_count_info in class uvm_component
../ivl_uvm_single_file.sv:1214: warning: User function 'uvm_count_info' is being called as a task.
../ivl_uvm_single_file.sv:1218: internal error: Can't find task uvm_count_info in class uvm_component
../ivl_uvm_single_file.sv:1218: warning: User function 'uvm_count_info' is being called as a task.
../ivl_uvm_single_file.sv:1221: internal error: Can't find task uvm_count_info in class uvm_component
../ivl_uvm_single_file.sv:1221: warning: User function 'uvm_count_info' is being called as a task.
../ivl_uvm_single_file.sv:1226: internal error: Can't find task uvm_count_info in class uvm_component
../ivl_uvm_single_file.sv:1226: warning: User function 'uvm_count_info' is being called as a task.
../ivl_uvm_single_file.sv:1184: internal error: Can't find task uvm_count_info in class uvm_object
../ivl_uvm_single_file.sv:1184: warning: User function 'uvm_count_info' is being called as a task.
../ivl_uvm_single_file.sv:1291: warning: User function 'uvm_count_info' is being called as a task.
../ivl_uvm_single_file.sv:1292: warning: User function 'uvm_count_info' is being called as a task.
../ivl_uvm_single_file.sv:1293: warning: User function 'uvm_count_info' is being called as a task.
../ivl_uvm_single_file.sv:1294: warning: User function 'uvm_count_info' is being called as a task.
6 error(s) during elaboration.

```
